name: spec-docs
description: Generate grounded improvement ideas, shape them into requirements docs, turn those into implementation plans and ship them, review the changes, and design the product strategy and JTBD docs.

save_path.title: Document save location
save_path.description: Root folder where Spec Doc Skills save their documents, relative to the project root. Strategy and JTBD save here directly; ideation, requirements, and plans save into subfolders beneath it.
